data.content: I need to download debug symbols for the .NET libraries using their Build IDs, then symbolicate the addresses. Let me fetch symbols from Microsoft's symbol server.

arguments.command: which llvm-symbolizer addr2line llvm-addr2line 2>/dev/null; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i llvm | head -5

# Try downloading libmonosgen-2.0.so debug symbols from Microsoft symbol server
# BuildId: 1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be
mkdir -p /tmp/symbols

# Try various URL formats for the Microsoft symbol server
for fmt in \
  "elf-buildid-1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be" \
  "elf-buildid-sym-1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be" \
  "1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"; do
  url="https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/${fmt}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"
  echo "Trying: $url"
  code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so -w "%{http_code}" -L "$url")
  echo "  HTTP $code, size: $(stat -c%s /tmp/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  if [ "$code" = "200" ]; then
    file /tmp/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so
    break
  fi
done
